overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through rolling grasslands during golden hour. The character traverses tall grass and dirt paths toward a large tree on the horizon, eventually joined by a pack horse from the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with rolling hills

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a large distant tree on the horizon

entered.detail: distant rolling green hills forming the horizon line
small oak trees scattered across the left side of the landscape
large solitary oak tree ahead serving as the destination point
tall green grass covering the ground throughout the field

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open prairie during golden hour, with rolling hills in the distance and scattered oak trees dotting the landscape. Tall grass sways as the character moves steadily toward a large solitary tree on the horizon.

events.description: ground surface transitions from pure grass to exposed rocky dirt path on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing walk as terrain becomes more varied with exposed rock and dirt formations on the right

entered.detail: rocky incline with exposed stone and sparse vegetation on the right side of the path
worn dirt trail becoming visible through the grass

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the terrain transitions from pure grassland to a mixed surface with a rocky slope on the right and a visible dirt path. The large target tree grows closer while the scattered background trees fall behind.

events.description: pack horse enters from right side and begins walking parallel to the character

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a pack horse that joined from the right, approaching the large oak tree

notable_agents.action: pack horse with saddlebags walking parallel to the character on the right side

entered.detail: horse carrying packs and saddlebags that approaches from the right to walk alongside

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, a pack horse joins the character from the right and walks alongside as they approach the large oak tree. The sun lowers creating a warm backlit atmosphere, and the terrain remains a mix of grass and rocky dirt path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across an open prairie that gradually transitions into a rocky path leading toward a solitary landmark. It begins with the character walking through swaying tall grass under a golden hour sky, moving steadily toward a large tree on the distant horizon. As the character progresses, the landscape shifts from pure grassland to a mixed terrain featuring a rocky slope and a visible dirt path, while the background trees recede. The scene then culminates as a pack horse joins from the right to walk alongside the character, with the lowering sun creating a warm, backlit atmosphere as they finally approach the large oak tree.
